howItWorks.title: How does SentivyaDZ work?
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to stay informed about everything said about your brand.

step1.title: We Collect Comments
step1.description: From Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram. Everything customers write in Dialect reaches you in one place.

step2.title: We Analyze in Dialect
step2.description: AI understands Algerian dialect and determines the sentiment: positive, negative, or neutral.

step3.title: Instant Alerts
step3.description: In case of increased negativity, you are immediately alerted to take action before brand reputation is affected.

whatWeOffer.title: What do we offer?
whatWeOffer.description: Clear tools to hear the voice of Algerian customers and protect your brand reputation.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Live statistics, comments in dialect, and alerts when negativity increases. Everything on one page.

dialectAnalysis.title: Algerian Dialect Analysis
dialectAnalysis.description: Our model understands Algerian writing on social media: expressions, abbreviations, and tone of speech.

reputationIndicator.title: Brand Reputation Indicator
reputationIndicator.description: Is reputation rising or falling? Clear alert before crisis escalates.

whoWeServe.title: Who do we serve?
whoWeServe.description: Brands, companies, and customer service teams can benefit from SentivyaDZ.

platforms.title: Connected to platforms your customers use daily
platforms.description: We collect sentiments from Twitter (X), Facebook, and Instagram in one place.

cta.title: Ready to hear your customers' voice in dialect?
cta.description: Start now by creating an account or contact our team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.description: We've selected the most frequently asked questions from our clients about surveys, the platform, and Algerian dialect analysis. You can always contact us if you don't find your answer here.

questions.q1: How does SentivyaDZ specifically handle Algerian dialect?
questions.a1: Our model has been trained to understand Algerian dialect with all its expressions, abbreviations, and popular vocabulary. It supports analyzing writing in dialect as used by Algerian customers on social media platforms.
questions.q2: What social media platforms does SentivyaDZ support?
questions.a2: We support Twitter (X), Facebook, and Instagram. We can monitor all comments and posts that mention your brand and analyze them in Algerian dialect.
questions.q3: Can I receive instant alerts when negative sentiments increase?
questions.a3: Yes, the platform provides an instant alert system that monitors the level of negative sentiments. When the specified threshold is exceeded, you are immediately notified to take necessary actions to protect your brand reputation.
questions.q4: Does the platform support languages other than Algerian dialect?
questions.a4: SentivyaDZ focuses primarily on Algerian dialect for its excellence in this field, but we plan to add support for Modern Standard Arabic and other Maghreb dialects in the future.
questions.q5: How can I start using SentivyaDZ?
questions.a5: You can easily start by creating an account and logging into the platform directly.

socialListening.title: Analysis of Algerian Customers' Sentiments on Social Media
socialListening.description: We collect comments in Algerian dialect from Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram, and evaluate general sentiment (positive / negative / neutral) with instant alerts when negative tone increases.
socialListening.warning: Warning: Noticeable increase in negative sentiments
socialListening.warningDescription: Current negative sentiment percentage has exceeded {{threshold}}%. Review recent comments and identify possible causes for decreased customer satisfaction. Brand reputation is at risk of decline.
socialListening.reputationIndicator: Brand Reputation Indicator (sentiments for this period)
socialListening.attentionRisk: Attention: Reputation at risk of decline
